chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الصُّفْرَةَ قَبْلَ الْحَيْضِ أَوْ بَعْدَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – The woman sees the yellowness before the menstruation (Haydh), or after it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/209)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/209)
text: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا حَاضِرٌ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الصُّفْرَةَ فَقَالَ مَا كَانَ قَبْلَ الْحَيْضِ فَهُوَ مِنَ الْحَيْضِ وَ مَا كَانَ بَعْدَ الْحَيْضِ فَلَيْسَ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Abu Hamza who said,

‘Abu Abdullahasws was asked and I was present, about the woman who sees the yellowness. So heasws said: ‘Whatever was before the menstruation (Haydh), so it is from the menstruation (Haydh), and whatever was after the menstruation (Haydh), so it is not from it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Khalid from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn abu Hamzah who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked, when I was in his presence, about the case of a woman who experiences a discharge of yellowish color. He (the Imam) said, ‘What is before Hayd (menses) is of Hayd (menses) and what is after Hayd (menses) is not Hayd (menses).”’
